title: DESencrypt
text: DESencrypt Encode 8 bytes of data in DES format extern void DESencrypt(const unsigned char * Value , unsigned char * DESkey , long Encrypted ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description Value IN 8 bytes of data that is to be encoded. DESkey IN 8 byte DES key that is to be used to encode Value Encrypted OUT DES-encoded result, also 8 bytes in length Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data. Related Links DESdecrypt Decode 8 bytes of data in DES format Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
